§6Laboratory Glassware§f

§aEarly-game alternative to the Chemical Plant — craft simple recipes by hand!§f

§bLaboratory Glassware§f is a hand-held utensil that replaces the Chemical Plant for simple chemical recipes. It comes in two variants:

§b• Normal§f: Glass + Iron Ingot → basic version
§b• Boron§f: Boron Glass + Steel + Cobalt Ingot → higher durability

§6Recipes Available§f:
§b• TNT§f
§b• C-4§f
§b• Solid Fuel§f
§b• Bakelite Powder§f (Aromatic HC + Petroleum Gas)
§b• Engine Lubricant§f
§b• Dynamite§f

Both variants can be crafted or found in abandoned structures, most commonly in §bBunkers§f.

§eTip§f: Lab glassware is invaluable early on when you don't have a Chemical Plant yet. The Boron variant lasts much longer. Use it for Bakelite powder and solid fuel — two critical materials for mid-game progression!
